subcodes.first_line: How wondrous, how truly wondrous, that thou hast transcended vain imaginings and turned with yearning toward the ocean of certitude! How wondrous, how truly wondrous, that thou hast with mighty arm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عجب عجب که از اوهام گذشتی و ببحر یقین اقبال نمودی عجب عجب که اصنام را بعضد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @living waters; water of life, @personal instructions, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
